# The Theory of Relativity Put an End to the Idea of Absolute Time

> The theory of relativity put an end to the idea of absolute time.

**Citation:** Hawking, Stephen. *A Brief History of Time*. Bantam Books, 1988. Kindle edition. 2   Space and Time, p. 22, loc. 310.
